# agentctl

> agentctl is the open-source, local-first control plane for AI agent environments, developed by justREPL.

- [Canonical site](https://agentctl.justrepl.com/)
- [Source repository](https://github.com/lstan44/agentctl)
- License: Apache-2.0

## Current release

v0.1 is a read-only inspector. It inventories known Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, and Cursor configuration roots; identifies duplicate and divergent skills; inventories skill script files; and reports potential secret-bearing key names without reporting their values.

The `inspect` and `doctor` commands never execute target tools, skills, scripts, hooks, plugins, or MCP servers, and never write into agent configuration roots.

## Documentation

- [Getting started](https://agentctl.justrepl.com/docs/)
- [Security model](https://agentctl.justrepl.com/security/)
- [Installer source](https://agentctl.justrepl.com/install.sh)
- [JSON schema](https://github.com/lstan44/agentctl/blob/main/spec/schemas/inspect-report.schema.json)

## Install

```sh
curl -fsSL https://agentctl.justrepl.com/install.sh | bash
```

Then run:

```sh
agentctl inspect
```
